homepage.heroSubline: Leos General Flooring Contractors: Expert installation and repair across Tucson. Quality materials, lasting results.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Flooring Expertise in Tucson
aboutText: Leos General Flooring Contractors L.L.C was founded over a decade ago by Leo, a Tucson native with a passion for craftsmanship. Starting with small residential projects, our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction quickly fueled our growth. We're not just installing floors; we're building lasting foundations for Tucson homes and businesses.

Our approach is simple: understand your vision, provide expert guidance, and execute flawlessly. We value honesty, integrity, and hard work. We use only the highest quality materials, ensuring your flooring stands up to the harsh Tucson climate. From initial consultation to final walkthrough, we prioritize clear communication and meticulous attention to detail.

As a local business, we're deeply invested in the Tucson community. We actively support local schools and charities, and we're committed to sustainable practices. We believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much. When you choose Leos, you're choosing a partner who cares about your project and your community.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Enhance your Tucson home with the timeless elegance of hardwood.
services.description:
Hardwood flooring adds warmth and value to any Tucson home. At Leos General Flooring Contractors, we offer a wide selection of hardwood species, from classic oak and maple to exotic options like Brazilian cherry and bamboo. Our experienced installers ensure a flawless finish that will last for years to come, even with Tucson's dry climate. 

We handle every stage of the process, from subfloor preparation to sanding and sealing. We can also match existing hardwood floors for seamless repairs or additions. Whether you're looking for a traditional look or a modern aesthetic, we'll help you find the perfect hardwood flooring to complement your style and budget. We also provide dustless sanding options to minimize disruption to your home.

Consider the unique challenges of Tucson's climate. We can advise you on the best hardwood options for moisture resistance and durability. We also offer specialized coatings to protect your floors from scratches and UV damage, ensuring they maintain their beauty for years to come. We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional craftsmanship and customer satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – Discuss your vision and select the perfect hardwood style.
Step 2: Subfloor Preparation – Ensure a level and stable base for optimal installation.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Precise installation with attention to detail.
Step 4: Sanding and Finishing – Achieve a smooth, durable, and beautiful surface.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Tucson's climate?
faq.answer: Engineered hardwood is often a better choice than solid hardwood in Tucson due to its resistance to moisture fluctuations. We also recommend considering species like mesquite or acacia, which are naturally more resistant to dryness.

faq.question: How often should I refinish my hardwood floors?
faq.answer: Depending on foot traffic and wear, hardwood floors typically need refinishing every 7-10 years. We can assess the condition of your floors and recommend the best course of action.

faq.question: Do you offer dustless sanding?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer dustless sanding options to minimize mess and disruption during the refinishing process. This is a great option for homes with allergies or sensitivities.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable and stylish tile flooring solutions for Tucson homes and businesses.
services.description:
Tile flooring is a versatile and practical choice for Tucson homes, offering exceptional durability, water resistance, and design flexibility. Leos General Flooring Contractors specializes in the installation of all types of tile, including ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone. Whether you're renovating a bathroom, kitchen, or entryway, we can help you create a stunning and functional space.

We understand the importance of proper subfloor preparation for tile installation. Our team will ensure a level and stable base to prevent cracks and ensure the longevity of your tile floor. We also offer expert grout sealing services to protect against stains and moisture damage, crucial in Tucson's monsoon season. We can guide you through the selection process, considering factors like style, durability, and budget.

From intricate mosaic patterns to large-format tiles, we have the expertise to handle any project. We stay up-to-date on the latest trends and techniques, ensuring your tile floor is not only beautiful but also installed to the highest standards. We prioritize customer satisfaction and guarantee our workmanship. We'll also advise on the best cleaning products to keep your tile looking its best.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Explore tile options and create a custom design.
Step 2: Subfloor Preparation – Ensure a level and stable foundation for tile installation.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Precise tile placement and grout application.
Step 4: Sealing and Finishing – Protect your tile and grout for long-lasting beauty.

faq.question: What is the difference between ceramic and porcelain tile?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is denser and more water-resistant than ceramic tile, making it a better choice for high-moisture areas like bathrooms and patios. Ceramic tile is generally more affordable and suitable for less demanding applications.

faq.question: How do I prevent grout from staining?
faq.answer: Regular cleaning and sealing are essential for preventing grout stains. We recommend using a pH-neutral cleaner and resealing your grout every 1-2 years.

faq.question: Can you install tile over existing flooring?
faq.answer: In some cases, we can install tile over existing flooring if the subfloor is structurally sound and level. However, it's often best to remove the existing flooring to ensure a proper installation.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable and stylish laminate flooring options for Tucson homeowners.
services.description:
Laminate flooring offers a cost-effective and attractive alternative to hardwood and tile. Leos General Flooring Contractors provides a wide selection of laminate styles that mimic the look of natural materials. Laminate is durable, easy to maintain, and resistant to scratches and fading, making it a practical choice for busy Tucson households.

We offer professional laminate installation services, ensuring a seamless and long-lasting floor. Our team will properly prepare the subfloor to prevent unevenness and ensure a smooth finish. We also use high-quality underlayment to provide cushioning and sound insulation. Considering Tucson's climate, we recommend choosing laminate with a moisture-resistant core to prevent warping and damage.

From classic wood grains to modern tile patterns, we have a laminate style to suit any taste. We can help you select the perfect laminate flooring to complement your home's décor and budget. We also offer a variety of edge profiles to create a custom look. We stand behind our workmanship and guarantee your satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Selection and Design – Choose the perfect laminate style for your space.
Step 2: Subfloor Preparation – Ensure a level and clean surface for installation.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Precise cutting and fitting for a seamless look.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – Install moldings and trim for a polished appearance.

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While laminate is water-resistant, it is not completely waterproof. We recommend cleaning up spills immediately to prevent damage. For high-moisture areas, consider waterproof laminate options.

faq.question: How do I clean laminate flooring?
faq.answer: Use a damp mop and a pH-neutral cleaner specifically designed for laminate flooring. Avoid using excessive water or harsh chemicals.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: While DIY installation is possible, professional installation ensures a proper fit and finish. Our experienced installers can handle any challenges and guarantee a long-lasting floor.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Waterproof and resilient vinyl flooring solutions for Tucson's active lifestyles.
services.description:
Vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for Tucson homeowners seeking a waterproof, durable, and stylish flooring option. Leos General Flooring Contractors offers a wide range of vinyl flooring options, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tile, and luxury vinyl plank (LVP). Vinyl is resistant to moisture, scratches, and stains, making it ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, and high-traffic areas.

We provide expert vinyl flooring installation services, ensuring a seamless and long-lasting floor. Our team will properly prepare the subfloor to create a smooth and level surface. We also use high-quality adhesives to prevent lifting and bubbling. Understanding Tucson's temperature fluctuations, we ensure proper acclimation of the vinyl before installation.

From classic wood looks to modern tile designs, we have a vinyl style to suit any décor. We can help you select the perfect vinyl flooring to complement your home's style and budget. We stand behind our workmanship and guarantee your satisfaction. Its ease of maintenance makes vinyl a great choice for rental properties as well.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Explore vinyl options and select the perfect style.
Step 2: Subfloor Preparation – Ensure a smooth and level surface for installation.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Precise cutting and fitting for a seamless finish.
Step 4: Sealing and Finishing – Protect your vinyl floor for long-lasting beauty.

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for bathrooms?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its waterproof properties. It's also resistant to mold and mildew.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl flooring?
faq.answer: Use a damp mop and a pH-neutral cleaner specifically designed for vinyl flooring. Avoid using abrasive cleaners or scouring pads.

faq.question: What is the difference between sheet vinyl and vinyl plank?
faq.answer: Sheet vinyl comes in large rolls, providing a seamless surface. Vinyl plank is installed in individual pieces, creating a more realistic wood or tile look.

services.name: Carpet Installation
services.shortDescription: Comfortable and stylish carpet installation services for homes in Tucson.
services.description:
Carpet offers warmth, comfort, and sound insulation, making it a popular choice for bedrooms, living rooms, and play areas in Tucson homes. Leos General Flooring Contractors provides professional carpet installation services, ensuring a plush and long-lasting floor. We offer a wide selection of carpet styles, colors, and textures to suit any taste and budget.

Our experienced installers will properly prepare the subfloor, install high-quality padding, and stretch the carpet for a wrinkle-free finish. We use industry-leading techniques to ensure a seamless and durable installation. Given Tucson's dry climate, we recommend choosing carpets with stain-resistant properties to prevent fading and discoloration.

From plush shags to durable berbers, we have a carpet style to meet your needs. We can help you select the perfect carpet to complement your home's décor and lifestyle. We also offer carpet repair and cleaning services to keep your carpet looking its best. We guarantee our workmanship and prioritize customer satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Selection and Design – Choose the perfect carpet style and color.
Step 2: Subfloor Preparation – Ensure a clean and level surface for installation.
Step 3: Padding Installation – Provide cushioning and sound insulation.
Step 4: Professional Installation – Precise stretching and trimming for a seamless look.
benefits: Wide Variety of Styles and Colors

faq.question: What type of carpet is best for high-traffic areas?
faq.answer: Berber carpets are a durable and stain-resistant choice for high-traffic areas. They are also a good option for homes with pets.

faq.question: How often should I clean my carpets?
faq.answer: We recommend professional carpet cleaning every 6-12 months to remove dirt, allergens, and stains.

faq.question: What is the best way to remove stains from carpet?
faq.answer: Act quickly and blot the stain with a clean cloth. Avoid rubbing, which can spread the stain. Use a carpet stain remover specifically designed for the type of stain.

services.name: Flooring Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert flooring repair services to restore the beauty and function of your Tucson floors.
services.description:
Even the most durable flooring can suffer damage over time. Leos General Flooring Contractors offers comprehensive flooring repair services to restore the beauty and function of your Tucson floors. Whether you have cracked tiles, warped hardwood, or torn vinyl, our experienced technicians can diagnose the problem and provide effective solutions.

We handle all types of flooring repairs, including: hardwood refinishing, tile replacement, laminate repair, and vinyl patching. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a seamless and long-lasting repair. We understand the importance of matching existing flooring for a cohesive look. We'll source the closest possible match to seamlessly blend the repair with your existing floor.

Before suggesting a full replacement, we explore all repair options. We'll provide a detailed assessment of the damage and recommend the most cost-effective solution. We prioritize customer satisfaction and guarantee our workmanship. We understand Tucson homes and the common issues that arise due to the climate and age of the properties. From water damage to sun exposure, we have the expertise to address any flooring challenge.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment – Evaluate the extent of the damage and identify the cause.
Step 2: Material Sourcing – Find matching materials for a seamless repair.
Step 3: Professional Repair – Precise repairs to restore the flooring's integrity.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – Ensure a smooth and polished finish.
benefits: Extends the Life of Your Floors

faq.question: How can I prevent hardwood floors from warping?
faq.answer: Maintain consistent humidity levels in your home and clean up spills immediately. Avoid excessive moisture exposure.

faq.question: Can you repair cracked tiles?
faq.answer: Yes, we can remove and replace cracked tiles. We'll source a matching tile to ensure a seamless repair.

faq.question: What causes vinyl flooring to tear?
faq.answer: Sharp objects, heavy furniture, and excessive wear can cause vinyl flooring to tear. We can patch or replace damaged areas.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Leos team did a fantastic job installing new tile in my kitchen. They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is outstanding. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: Leo's Flooring installed beautiful hardwood floors in our living room. There were some minor delays due to material availability, but they communicated well and the final result is gorgeous. Very happy!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We needed new flooring in our rental property and Leos General Flooring Contractors provided a quick and affordable solution with laminate. The tenants love it, and it looks great! Will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Leo repaired some water damage to our hardwood floors after a monsoon storm. He matched the existing stain perfectly, and you can't even tell there was any damage. Excellent work!

reviews.name: Alicia M.
reviews.text: Leos installed vinyl flooring in our bathroom. The install team was quick, clean, and very respectful of our home. There was a small issue with the seam, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Great service!

reviews.name: Brian P.
reviews.text: Great experience. Needed carpet replaced in two bedrooms and Leos team was on time, professional, and did an excellent job. Would highly recommend their carpet installation services.
